personas: Primary User: Tech-Savvy Professional seeking efficiency and quick access to features.
Secondary User: Casual User preferring simplicity and guided interactions.
key_flows: Sign Up and Onboarding: User registers, completes profile, and receives guided introduction.
Core Task Completion: User navigates to main feature, inputs data, and successfully completes task.
Support Access: User encounters issue and accesses help resources or contacts support.
friction_points: Confusing navigation labels leading to difficulty finding key features.
Insufficient feedback on form errors causing user frustration.
Slow loading times during data-heavy interactions impacting user satisfaction.

information_architecture.hierarchy: Content organized from broad categories to specific features, prioritizing most-used functions on top level with contextual help and settings accessible via secondary navigation.
navigation: Primary Navigation: Dashboard, Features, Analytics, Support
Secondary Navigation: User Profile, Settings, Notifications, Help Center
categorization: Features grouped by functionality (e.g., Data Entry, Reporting, Integration)
Support content organized by topic (e.g., FAQs, Contact, Tutorials)

components: Left Sidebar: Primary navigation and quick access buttons
Main Content Area: Displays selected feature or content
Top Bar: User profile, notifications, search

responsive.mobile: Single-column layout with collapsible hamburger menu for navigation and bottom fixed action button for primary tasks.
responsive.tablet: Two-column layout with expandable sidebar and main content stacked as needed for readability.
responsive.desktop: Full two-column layout with persistent sidebar and top navigation bar for quick access.

design_system.typography: Primary font: 'Roboto', weights 400 (regular), 500 (medium), 700 (bold); font sizes scale from 12px (caption) to 24px (headings); line height 1.5 for readability.
design_system.colors: Primary color: #0052CC (blue); Secondary color: #172B4D (dark blue); Accent color: #FF5630 (red); Background: #FFFFFF (white); Text: #333333 (dark gray); Support colors for success (#36B37E) and warning (#FFAB00).
design_system.spacing: Base spacing unit of 8px with multiples used for margin and padding (8px, 16px, 24px, 32px).
components: Buttons: Primary (filled), Secondary (outlined), Disabled state styling
Forms: Text inputs, dropdowns, checkboxes, radio buttons with error and focus states
Modals: Centered with overlay, dismissible via close icon and outside click

accessibility.keyboard_nav: All interactive elements are reachable and operable via keyboard with visible focus indicators; logical tab order maintained.
accessibility.screen_reader: Use ARIA landmarks and roles; form fields have associated labels; dynamic content updates announced appropriately.
accessibility.contrast_ratio: Text and interactive elements maintain minimum contrast ratio of 4.5:1 against backgrounds.

interactions.animations: Subtle fade and slide transitions for modal dialogs and dropdowns with duration of 200ms; button state changes have smooth color transitions.
interactions.loading_state: Spinner animation centered in components or full screen overlay with descriptive text 'Loading…' to inform users.
interactions.empty_state: Informative placeholder graphics with concise messaging guiding users to next steps or actions.
